flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at East Central Community College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $4.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at East Central Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $6.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at East Central Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.5% → 0.0%).
